ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument (e.g., Amazon_Nasdaq_AMZN) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "figi" TEXT /* Financial Instrument Global Identifier (FIGI) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, treasury note) */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the instrument belongs to */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market where the instrument is traded */,
  "isin_expired" INTEGER /* Whether the ISIN is expired */,
  "figi_expired" INTEGER /* Whether the FIGI is expired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "client_internal_id" TEXT /* Internal identifier for the client (e.g., imd_34634534) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Client's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Client's phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the client was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the client's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client owning the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy of the portfolio (e.g., Tech, Balanced) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_instruments" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Unit cost of the instrument */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the instrument (e.g., USD) */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was acquired */,
  "acquisition_price" REAL /* Price at which the instrument was acquired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sector */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_sectors" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the instrument belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id", "sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market (e.g., Nasdaq, NYSE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the market */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_markets" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market where the instrument is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id", "market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the client data */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the client data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the client data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or device used to access the client data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_values" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "valuation_date" TEXT /* Date of the portfolio valuation */,
  "portfolio_value" REAL /* Value of the portfolio on the valuation date */,
  "valuation_method" TEXT /* Method used to value the portfolio (e.g., last trade price, moving average) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "valuation_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_prices" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the instrument price */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the instrument on the price date */,
  "price_source" TEXT /* Source of the instrument price (e.g., exchange, data provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id", "price_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio involved in the transaction */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument transacted */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the instrument transacted */,
  "fee" REAL /* Any fee associated with the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
